evidence_summary: sts of Castle, Settlers hotels and Old York Hospital spook and delight tourists in WA town ShareShare article Ghosts of Castle, Settlers hotels and Old York Hospital spook and delight tourists in WA town By Sam McManus ABC Midwest & Wheatbelt Topic:History Thu 19 May 2022 at 7:37pmThu 19 May 2022 at 7:37pm Thu 19 May 2022 at 7:37pm The Old York Hospital is said to be one of the most haunted places in WA. (ABC Midwest & Wheatbelt: Sam McManus) abc.net.au/news/ghosts-of-york-wa-haunt-locals-tourists/101082076 Link copied ShareShare article Less than 100 kilometres east of Perth in the WA Wheatbelt, York is known for its colonial architecture, stunning wildflowers and thriving art scene. But inside the walls of the historic buildings, some say it's the ghosts that run the town. The Castle Hotel sits on Avon Terrace in the town centre and was established in 1853, making it almost as old as.
title: Ghosts of Castle, Settlers hotels and Old York Hospital spook and delight tourists in WA town

By Carla Howarth Topic:Community and Society Thu 4 Apr 2019 at 4:16pmThu 4 Apr 2019 at 4:16pm Thu 4 Apr 2019 at 4:16pm A female ghost is said to haunt Battery Point's historic Arthur Circus which has workers' cottages dating back to the mid 19th century. (Supplied: Ghost Tours of Hobart) abc.net.au/news/curious-hobart-famous-ghost-stories-tasmania/10962200 Link copied ShareShare article Whether you believe the stories or not, the tales about Hobart's famous ghosts and haunted houses have trickled down through generations. Hobart's convict history and grand old buildings make for ripper spooky stories, so it is.
title: What are Hobart's most famous ghost stories?
